candidates.snippet: Blog Profile Name: Comic Code, Comic Code Ligatures Type: Retail typeface Publisher: Tabular Type Foundry Release year: 2019 Purchase links: I Love Typography (both) Comic Code is a monospaced adaptation of the most infa
ial versions with limited character set, and there is a free font called Comic Mono that tackles the same basic idea. © 2026 Toshi Omagari Facebook Twitter EN Twitter JP Instagram GitHub
